spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing. Optical alignment.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-4 or gap-6

surface_strategy.dashboard_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-zinc-200), no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color darkens.
surface_strategy.headers: Solid Background with a hard bottom border (border-b border-zinc-200).
surface_strategy.sidebar: Light gray background (bg-zinc-50) with 1px right border, ditch the dark gradient. Use Lucide-react icons instead of emojis.

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-950 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-950 border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002480] hover:text-white rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-none px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-950 focus:border-transparent transition-all
components.tables: w-full text-sm text-left. Header: bg-zinc-50 border-y border-zinc-200 text-zinc-500 font-medium. Rows: border-b border-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-50/50 transition-colors.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA compliance. Black and dark gray text on white. Blue accent for actionable links/buttons. Explicit hover and focus states.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-invoice-button')

animations.micro_interactions: Subtle and fast. 150ms ease-in-out for hover states, background color changes, and border color changes.
animations.page_transitions: Fade-in with slight upward motion (framer-motion, y: 10 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1, duration: 0.3s).

instructions_to_main_agent: Replace all inline styles with Tailwind CSS utility classes.
Remove all emoji icons from navigation and UI, replace with lucide-react icons.
Replace the dark gradient sidebar with a crisp, minimal light sidebar (bg-zinc-50) or pure white with right border.
Use flat, cardless design for dashboard widgets: simple rectangular divs with 1px border-zinc-200 and no shadow. Remove rounded corners (rounded-none).
Implement Cabinet Grotesk for all headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Import them via standard methods.
Use International Klein Blue (#002FA7) sparingly, only for primary call-to-actions or active states. Otherwise, stick to monochrome (zinc-950, zinc-500, white).
Ensure all forms, tables, and lists are dense, properly aligned, and use borders to separate rows instead of distinct cards.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for testing (e.g., buttons, inputs, links).
Ensure all the component and logic code remains in .js files since the project does not use TypeScript.
